children.name: register
children.description: Register an appservice using its registration YAML

children.name: unregister
children.description: Unregister an appservice using its ID

children.name: show-appservice-config
children.description: Show an appservice's config using its ID

children.name: list-registered
children.description: List all the currently registered appservices

children.name: create-user
children.description: Create a new user

args.name: password
args.description: Password of the new user, if unspecified one is generated

children.name: reset-password
children.description: Reset user password

args.name: username
args.description: Username of the user for whom the password should be reset

args.name: password
args.description: New password for the user, if unspecified one is generated

children.name: deactivate
children.description: Deactivate a user

children.name: deactivate-all
children.description: Deactivate a list of users

children.name: logout
children.description: Forcefully log a user out of all of their devices

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to log out

children.name: suspend
children.description: Suspend a user

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to suspend

children.name: unsuspend
children.description: Unsuspend a user

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to unsuspend

children.name: lock
children.description: Lock a user

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to lock

children.name: unlock
children.description: Unlock a user

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to unlock

children.name: enable-login
children.description: Enable login for a user

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to enable login for

children.name: disable-login
children.description: Disable login for a user

args.name: user_id
args.description: Username of the user to disable login for

children.name: list-users
children.description: List local users in the database

children.name: list-joined-rooms
children.description: Lists all the rooms (local and remote) that the specified user is joined in

children.name: force-join-room
children.description: Manually join a local user to a room

children.name: force-leave-room
children.description: Manually leave a local user from a room

children.name: force-leave-remote-room
children.description: Manually leave a remote room for a local user

children.name: force-demote
children.description: Forces the specified user to drop their power levels to the room default, if their permissions allow and the auth check permits

children.name: make-user-admin
children.description: Grant server-admin privileges to a user

children.name: put-room-tag
children.description: Puts a room tag for the specified user and room ID

children.name: delete-room-tag
children.description: Deletes the room tag for the specified user and room ID

children.name: get-room-tags
children.description: Gets all the room tags for the specified user and room ID

children.name: redact-event
children.description: Attempts to forcefully redact the specified event ID from the sender user

children.name: force-join-list-of-local-users
children.description: Force joins a specified list of local users to join the specified room

children.name: force-join-all-local-users
children.description: Force joins all local users to the specified room

children.name: issue
children.description: Issue a new registration token

args.name: max_uses
args.description: The maximum number of times this token is allowed to be used before it expires

args.name: max_age
args.description: The maximum age of this token (e.g. 30s, 5m, 7d). It will expire after this much time has passed

children.name: revoke
children.description: Revoke a registration token

children.name: list
children.description: List all registration tokens

children.name: list-rooms
children.description: List all rooms the server knows about

children.name: info
children.description: View information about a room we know about

children.name: list-joined-members
children.description: List joined members in a room

children.name: view-room-topic
children.description: Displays room topic

children.name: moderation
children.description: Manage moderation of remote or local rooms

children.name: ban-room
children.description: Bans a room from local users joining and evicts all our local users (including server admins) from the room. Also blocks any invites (local and remote) for the banned room, and disables federation entirely with it

args.name: room
args.description: The room in the format of `!roomid:example.com` or a room alias in the format of `#roomalias:example.com`

children.name: ban-list-of-rooms
children.description: Bans a list of rooms (room IDs and room aliases) from a newline delimited codeblock similar to `user deactivate-all`. Applies the same steps as ban-room

children.name: unban-room
children.description: Unbans a room to allow local users to join again

args.name: room
args.description: The room in the format of `!roomid:example.com` or a room alias in the format of `#roomalias:example.com`

children.name: list-banned-rooms
children.description: List of all rooms we have banned

children.name: alias
children.description: Manage rooms' aliases

children.name: set
children.description: Make an alias point to a room

args.name: room_id
args.description: The room id to set the alias on

args.name: room_alias_localpart
args.description: The alias localpart to use (`alias`, not `#alias:servername.tld`)

children.name: remove
children.description: Remove a local alias

args.name: room_alias_localpart
args.description: The alias localpart to remove (`alias`, not `#alias:servername.tld`)

children.name: which
children.description: Show which room is using an alias

args.name: room_alias_localpart
args.description: The alias localpart to look up (`alias`, not `#alias:servername.tld`)

children.name: list
children.description: List aliases currently being used

args.name: room_id
args.description: If set, only list the aliases for this room

children.name: directory
children.description: Manage the room directory

children.name: publish
children.description: Publish a room to the room directory

args.name: room_id
args.description: The room id of the room to publish

children.name: unpublish
children.description: Unpublish a room to the room directory

args.name: room_id
args.description: The room id of the room to unpublish

children.name: list
children.description: List rooms that are published

children.name: exists
children.description: Check if we know about a room

children.name: incoming-federation
children.description: List all rooms we are currently handling an incoming pdu from

children.name: disable-room
children.description: Disables incoming federation handling for a room

children.name: enable-room
children.description: Enables incoming federation handling for a room again

children.name: fetch-support-well-known
children.description: Fetch `/.well-known/matrix/support` from the specified server

children.name: remote-user-in-rooms
children.description: Lists all the rooms we share/track with the specified *remote* user

children.name: uptime
children.description: Time elapsed since startup

children.name: show-config
children.description: Show configuration values

children.name: reload-config
children.description: Reload configuration values

children.name: memory-usage
children.description: Print database memory usage statistics

children.name: clear-caches
children.description: Clears all of Continuwuity's caches

children.name: backup-database
children.description: Performs an online backup of the database (only available for RocksDB at the moment)

children.name: list-backups
children.description: List database backups

children.name: admin-notice
children.description: Send a message to the admin room

children.name: reload-mods
children.description: Hot-reload the server

children.name: restart
children.description: Restart the server

children.name: shutdown
children.description: Shutdown the server

children.name: delete
children.description: Deletes a single media file from our database and on the filesystem via a single MXC URL or event ID (not redacted)

args.name: event_id
args.description: The message event ID which contains the media and thumbnail MXC URLs

children.name: delete-list
children.description: Deletes a codeblock list of MXC URLs from our database and on the filesystem. This will always ignore errors

children.name: delete-past-remote-media
children.description:
Deletes all remote (and optionally local) media created before/after
[duration] ago, using filesystem metadata first created at date, or
fallback to last modified date. This will always ignore errors by
default.

args.name: duration
args.description: The relative time (e.g. 30s, 5m, 7d) from now within which to search

children.name: delete-all-from-user
children.description: Deletes all the local media from a local user on our server. This will always ignore errors by default

children.name: delete-all-from-server
children.description: Deletes all remote media from the specified remote server. This will always ignore errors by default

args.name: mxc
args.description: The MXC URL to lookup info for

children.name: check-all-users
children.description: Uses the iterator in `src/database/key_value/users.rs` to iterator over every user in our database (remote and local). Reports total count, any errors if there were any, etc

children.name: echo
children.description: Echo input of admin command

children.name: get-auth-chain
children.description: Get the auth_chain of a PDU

args.name: event_id
args.description: An event ID (the $ character followed by the base64 reference hash)

children.name: parse-pdu
children.description: Parse and print a PDU from a JSON

children.name: get-pdu
children.description: Retrieve and print a PDU by EventID from the Continuwuity database

args.name: event_id
args.description: An event ID (a $ followed by the base64 reference hash)

children.name: get-short-pdu
children.description: Retrieve and print a PDU by PduId from the Continuwuity database

children.name: get-remote-pdu
children.description: Attempts to retrieve a PDU from a remote server. **Does not** insert it into the database or persist it anywhere

args.name: event_id
args.description: An event ID (a $ followed by the base64 reference hash)

args.name: server
args.description: Argument for us to attempt to fetch the event from the specified remote server

children.name: get-remote-pdu-list
children.description: Same as `get-remote-pdu` but accepts a codeblock newline delimited list of PDUs and a single server to fetch from

args.name: server
args.description: Argument for us to attempt to fetch all the events from the specified remote server

children.name: get-room-state
children.description: Gets all the room state events for the specified room

children.name: get-signing-keys
children.description: Get and display signing keys from local cache or remote server

children.name: get-verify-keys
children.description: Get and display signing keys from local cache or remote server

children.name: ping
children.description: Sends a federation request to the remote server's `/_matrix/federation/v1/version` endpoint and measures the latency it took for the server to respond

children.name: force-device-list-updates
children.description: Forces device lists for all local and remote users to be updated (as having new keys available)

children.name: change-log-level
children.description: Change tracing log level/filter on the fly

children.name: verify-json
children.description: Verify JSON signatures

children.name: verify-pdu
children.description: Verify PDU

children.name: first-pdu-in-room
children.description: Prints the very first PDU in the specified room (typically m.room.create)

children.name: latest-pdu-in-room
children.description: Prints the latest ("last") PDU in the specified room (typically a message)

children.name: force-set-room-state-from-server
children.description: Forcefully replaces the room state of our local copy of the specified room, with the copy (auth chain and room state events) the specified remote server says

args.name: server_name
args.description: The server we will use to query the room state for

args.name: event_id
args.description: The event ID of the latest known PDU in the room. Will be found automatically if not provided

children.name: resolve-true-destination
children.description: Runs a server name through Continuwuity's true destination resolution process

children.name: memory-stats
children.description: Print extended memory usage

children.name: runtime-metrics
children.description: Print general tokio runtime metric totals

children.name: runtime-interval
children.description: Print detailed tokio runtime metrics accumulated since last command invocation

children.name: time
children.description: Print the current time

children.name: database-stats
children.description: Get database statistics

children.name: trim-memory
children.description: Trim memory usage

children.name: database-files
children.description: List database files

children.name: tester
children.description: Developer test stubs

name: query
description: Low-level queries for database getters and iterators

children.name: account-data
children.description: account_data.rs iterators and getters

children.name: changes-since
children.description: Returns all changes to the account data that happened after `since`

args.name: room_id
args.description: Optional room ID of the account data

children.name: account-data-get
children.description: Searches the account data for a specific kind

args.name: room_id
args.description: Optional room ID of the account data

children.name: appservice
children.description: appservice.rs iterators and getters

children.name: get-registration
children.description: Gets the appservice registration info/details from the ID as a string

children.name: all
children.description: Gets all appservice registrations with their ID and registration info

children.name: presence
children.description: presence.rs iterators and getters

children.name: get-presence
children.description: Returns the latest presence event for the given user

children.name: presence-since
children.description: Iterator of the most recent presence updates that happened after the event with id `since`

children.name: room-alias
children.description: rooms/alias.rs iterators and getters

children.name: local-aliases-for-room
children.description: Iterator of all our local room aliases for the room ID

children.name: all-local-aliases
children.description: Iterator of all our local aliases in our database with their room IDs

children.name: room-state-cache
children.description: rooms/state_cache iterators and getters

children.name: room-timeline
children.description: rooms/timeline iterators and getters

children.name: globals
children.description: globals.rs iterators and getters

children.name: signing-keys-for
children.description: This returns an empty `Ok(BTreeMap<..>)` when there are no keys found for the server

children.name: sending
children.description: sending.rs iterators and getters

children.name: active-requests
children.description: Queries database for all `servercurrentevent_data`

children.name: active-requests-for
children.description: Queries database for `servercurrentevent_data` but for a specific destination

children.name: queued-requests
children.description: Queries database for `servernameevent_data` which are the queued up requests that will eventually be sent

children.name: users
children.description: users.rs iterators and getters

children.name: resolver
children.description: resolver service

children.name: destinations-cache
children.description: Query the destinations cache

children.name: overrides-cache
children.description: Query the overrides cache

children.name: flush-cache
children.description: Flush a specific server from the resolver caches or everything

children.name: pusher
children.description: pusher service

children.name: get-pushers
children.description: Returns all the pushers for the user

children.name: short
children.description: short service

children.name: raw
children.description: raw service

children.name: raw-maps
children.description: List database maps

children.name: raw-get
children.description: Raw database query

children.name: raw-del
children.description: Raw database delete (for string keys)

children.name: raw-keys
children.description: Raw database keys iteration

children.name: raw-keys-sizes
children.description: Raw database key size breakdown

children.name: raw-keys-total
children.description: Raw database keys total bytes

children.name: raw-vals-sizes
children.description: Raw database values size breakdown

children.name: raw-vals-total
children.description: Raw database values total bytes

children.name: raw-iter
children.description: Raw database items iteration

children.name: raw-keys-from
children.description: Raw database keys iteration

children.name: raw-iter-from
children.description: Raw database items iteration

children.name: raw-count
children.description: Raw database record count

children.name: compact
children.description: Compact database

args.name: parallelism
args.description: There is one compaction job per column; then this controls how many columns are compacted in parallel. If zero, one compaction job is still run at a time here, but in exclusive-mode blocking any other automatic compaction jobs until complete
